coverages_discussed.coverage_type: Workers Compensation / General Liability / Commercial Property
coverages_discussed.notes: Policy numbers listed across the prior insurance history include WC-, GL-, and CP-prefixed policies. Premiums are listed at the year level rather than by individual coverage. 2024: carrier not listed, policy numbers WC-8098-9663 / 0000005824 / CP003220-001, claims 11, cancellation No; 2023: Markel Corporation, policy numbers 7WC0009522 / 0000002291 / CP-1970-9645, premium 619820.26, claims 3, cancellation No; 2022: Zurich Insurance Group, policy numbers 0000004808 / GL-0002700 / 7CP0001066, premium 607294.45, claims 6, cancellation Yes; 2021: Chubb Limited, policy numbers 0000008163 / GL-8167-3439 / CP-0009781, premium 630843.2, claims 9, cancellation No; 2020: EMPLOYERS Insurance Group, policy numbers WC008082-001 / GL-4906-7512 / CP00007431, premium 580805.53, claims 2, cancellation No.

positives: Five years of prior insurance history are documented from 2020 through 2024.
Cancellation is marked No for 2020, 2021, 2023, and 2024.
concerns: Claims were reported in every listed year, with the highest count shown in 2024 at 11.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Claims by year were 2 (2020), 9 (2021), 6 (2022), 3 (2023), and 11 (2024). Loss ratio values were not provided. Cancellation was marked Yes for 2022 and No for the other listed years.
